mapper.select: SELECT u.public_id AS publicId, u.nickname AS nickname, u.friend_code AS friendCode, u.profile_img AS profileImg FROM friendships f JOIN users u ON u.user_id = CASE WHEN f.requester_user_id = #{myUserId} THEN f.receiver_user_id ELSE f.requester_user_id END WHERE f.friendship_status = 'ACCEPTED' AND ( f.requester_user_id = #{myUserId} OR f.receiver_user_id = #{myUserId} ) AND u.user_status = 'ACTIVE'

SELECT u.public_id AS publicId, u.nickname AS nickname, u.friend_code AS friendCode, u.profile_img AS profileImg FROM friendships f JOIN users u ON u.user_id = f.requester_user_id WHERE f.receiver_user_id = #{myUserId} AND f.friendship_status = 'PENDING' AND u.user_status = 'ACTIVE'
